:::{style="text-align: center;"}

**Teaching Philosophy, Pedagogy, and Courses Taught **

:::

My research pays rigorous attention to research design, case selection and comparative case studies, and uses qualitative methods such as ethnographic fieldwork, in-depth interviews and participant observation, in addition to using the quantitative toolkit such as large-n data analysis. 

These research themes and methodological approaches form the basis of the courses I teach: 

- Intro to Comparative Politics

- Politics of India/South Asia

- Senior Seminar on Comparative Ethnic Politics  

- Qualitative Research Methods

- Globalization and its Critics
